title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 170.057 - Incidental fund moneys may be used for books, supplies and educational television
text:
170.057.  Incidental fund moneys may be used for books, supplies and educational television. — The school board of any school district may expend either textbook fund moneys or incidental fund moneys to provide supplementary texts, library reference books, instructional supplies and contractual educational television services for the pupils of the district's elementary and secondary schools.
(L. 1977 H.B. 130)
